-PORTVERSION=	0.26
+PORTVERSION=	0.28
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:DOY
@@ -19,7 +19,4 @@ TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Test-Fatal>=0:${PORTSDI

 USE_PERL5=	configure
 
-MAN3=		Package::Stash::XS.3
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
